title: Excalibur | Sophisticated Support
description: Excalibur support for Sophisticated Core, Backpacks, and Storage
body:
![Main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9e3c9117658a7575651040e54464f4110489801.png)
This is a support pack that makes the textures from the Sophisticated mods collection match the medieval style of [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal).

Supported Mods:
- _[Sophisticated Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-core)_
- _[Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks)_
- _[Sophisticated Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage)_

Note: ignore incompatibility warning for this pack. This is just because of the pack format value, which doesn't matter for this specific pack.

### **Features:**
- Retexture of all GUIs
- Retexture of all icons
- Retexture of all chests, barrels, and limited barrels
- Retexture of all backpack and storage upgrades
- Retexture of some random items

### **Showcase:**
![Upgrades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b7396a0063f498fd0916af923784d1c54fb7bbe.png)
![Backpack GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61addc52bd79cc97759b8d756e8d0b849fddefd4.png)
![Chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2bd1d2468720aef68425486aad67e8543abc0d9.png)

### **Credit:**
- Maffhew - Author of [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal)
- P3pp3rF1y - Author of [Sophisticated Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-core), [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks), and [Sophisticated Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage)
